legal_notice.title: ⚠ READ BEFORE SUBMITTING
content: Issues submitted on any other day of the week are **voided and non-refundable.**
No exceptions. No appeals. The schedule is the filter.
**Delivery: Weekends.** Reports are delivered Saturday or Sunday via scheduled reply.
Standard turnaround is same weekend or following weekend depending on tier and submission date.
**Expedited work** is available at a daily multiplier. Work required in under 4 hours is not accepted.
**Payment verification:** Submit your Stripe transaction code below.
Send the payment screenshot to the contact email on file.
I match the transaction code in this issue to your email and Stripe. All three must align before work begins.
If they do not align — the issue is closed. No refund.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.description: Must match the email the payment screenshot was sent from.

fields.label: Audit Tier
fields.description: Select the tier that matches your payment.

fields.label: Stripe Transaction Code
fields.description: The transaction ID from your Stripe payment. Format: ch_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

fields.label: Expedited Delivery?
fields.description: Standard delivery is weekend. Expedited adds a daily multiplier to the base price. Under 4 hours is not accepted.

fields.label: AI Outputs to Review
fields.description: Briefly describe the outputs. Attach files below. Do not paste raw text here.
fields.placeholder: 10 GPT-4o outputs from our customer support pipeline, March 2026. PDF attached.

fields.label: File Upload
fields.description: Upload your AI output files here. PDF, screenshots, or exported logs accepted. Max 10 files per submission.

fields.label: Schedule Acknowledgment
options: I understand that intake is Monday and Tuesday only. Submissions on any other day are voided and non-refundable.
I understand that delivery occurs on weekends and the standard turnaround is same or following weekend.
I understand that payment verification requires my transaction code in this issue AND a screenshot sent to the contact email. Both must match before work begins.
I understand that expedited work under 4 hours is not accepted.

fields.label: Legal Declaration
options: I confirm I am authorized to submit these AI outputs for external review. I have read and agree to the Terms of Service.
I understand that the completed audit report will be sealed using Sovereign Trace Protocol FROZEN-2.0 and permanently recorded in the public ledger.

steps: Payment verification — Stripe transaction code validated against email and screenshot.
Intake check — Only processed if submitted Monday or Tuesday.
Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Delivery — Report delivered weekend via scheduled reply.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The audit is the record. The seal is the certification.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
